action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the telescope environment, including time, weather conditions, storage capacity, and system status.

action_set_definitions.name: get_target_ephemeris
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the sky coordinates (Azimuth and Elevation) for a specific celestial target at the current time.

target_name.description: The name of the astronomical object (e.g., 'SN 2025a').

action_set_definitions.name: prepare_system
action_set_definitions.description: Transitions the telescope from 'stowed' to 'idle' mode and performs initial hardware checks.

action_set_definitions.name: calibrate_instrument
action_set_definitions.description: Executes standard calibration procedures for the observation band specified.

action_set_definitions.name: slew_to_target
action_set_definitions.description: Moves the telescope to the specified azimuth and elevation coordinates.

action_set_definitions.name: start_observation
action_set_definitions.description: Begins a tracked integration on the current target for a specified duration.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_archive_storage
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the data archive to confirm that the observation data file has been successfully written and stored.

target_name.description: The name of the observed object.

state_description.current_time_utc: The current simulation time in ISO 8601 format.
state_description.telescope_azimuth: The current horizontal angle of the telescope in degrees (0-360).
state_description.telescope_elevation: The current vertical angle of the telescope in degrees (0-90).
state_description.weather_wind_speed: Current wind speed at the site in km/h.
state_description.weather_cloud_cover: Percentage of the sky covered by clouds (0-100).
state_description.available_storage_gb: Remaining capacity in the local data storage buffer in Gigabytes.
